descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical and physical material properties

quality.loss_reason: distribution reduced to single characteristic value
quality.notes: loses shape, variance of size distribution

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.rationale: determines anisotropic mechanical and transport properties

representation.notes: ODF expanded in generalized spherical harmonics

quality.loss_reason: infinite series truncated at finite order
quality.truncation_error: low to moderate, depends on order
quality.notes: sharp textures need higher truncation order

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of maximum to minimum grain dimensions
descriptors.rationale: indicates grain elongation and processing history

quality.loss_reason: full shape distribution reduced to ratio
quality.notes: loses orientation and shape distribution information

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of boundary misorientation types
descriptors.rationale: controls intergranular properties like corrosion resistance

quality.loss_reason: continuous misorientation binned into discrete categories
quality.notes: spatial correlation and topology information lost

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total length of dislocations per volume
descriptors.rationale: primary indicator of plastic strain history

quality.loss_reason: spatial arrangement and character types aggregated
quality.notes: edge versus screw character not distinguished

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.rationale: represents recovery and initial recrystallization state

quality.loss_reason: distributions reduced to mean values only
quality.notes: spatial arrangement and multimodality not captured

descriptors.name: precipitate distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: second phase particle size and spatial characteristics
descriptors.rationale: controls strengthening and limits grain growth

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to summary statistics
quality.notes: monomodal assumption fails for bimodal distributions
